task_completion.description: Launch the Sygic GPS Navigation application
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Sygic app interface is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Access the settings menu within the Sygic app
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main menu or settings screen of the Sygic app is displayed.

task_completion.description: Find the specific setting related to map downloads, updates, or connection preferences
task_completion.visual_evidence: A settings screen containing options for 'Downloads', 'Connection', 'Cellular', or 'Wi-Fi' is visible.

task_completion.description: Disable the restriction that limits large downloads to Wi-Fi only
task_completion.visual_evidence: The toggle switch or checkbox for 'Wi-Fi only' (or similar wording for restricting downloads to Wi-Fi) is in the OFF or unchecked state.

task_completion.description: Return to the main map view after completing the configuration
task_completion.visual_evidence: The final screenshot shows the main navigation map view of the Sygic app, with no settings menus overlaying it.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface to change the setting
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal, command prompt, or ADB shell interfaces are visible being used to modify app preferences.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine Sygic application
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the actual Sygic GPS Navigation app (com.sygic.aura) and not a text editor modifying shared_prefs files directly.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a web browser to search for the task solution
integrity.visual_evidence: No web browser is open showing search results or tutorials on how to change Sygic download settings.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target setting relates to keywords such as 'wifi', 'connection', 'download', or 'cellular'. The expected state for the Wi-Fi only download restriction is 'toggle_off' (disabled/unchecked).
